titleStmt.title: SII 18.94: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 94. (B.K. No. 167 of 1933-34.)

summary.p: Slab set up in the Hanumantadēva temple. DĒVARAGEṆṆŪR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva, ruling from the capital Kalyāṇa, is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 13, Vibhava, Jyēshṭha Amāvāsyā, Friday, Solar eclipse. The date seems to be wrong. In the cyclic year cited, corresponding to A.D. 1088, there were two Jyēshṭhas and in neither of them a solar eclipse occurred, nor did the Amāvāsyā in either of them fall on a Friday. In the next year, i.e. Śukla, however, there was a solar eclipse on Jyēshṭha Amāvāsyā, corresponding to A.D. 1089 June 11, Monday.

It registers a gift of land for the brahmapuri and the worship of god Kēs11avadēva of the agrahāra town Gaṇḍega-grāma (modern Dēvarageṇṇūr the find place of the record) situated on the northern bank of the river Kṛishṇavenṇā, and included in Bāge Fifty, a sub-division of Tardavāḍi One-thousand. The donor was Āṅgabarasi who probably was administering Gaṇḍega grāma. Sōmanāthadaṇḍādhis11a, the grāmachakravarti of Gaṇḍeganūr, his wife Dēvalabbe and Vaijanātha (Vaijaṇa-daṇḍanātha) are praised. The province of Kāsavāḷa Savalakka is mentioned. The record is broken off at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājā
dhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatṛbhuvanamalladēvavi
jayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ śrīkalyāṇada nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire . śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 13 neya
vibhavasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭadamavāse sukravāradaṁdu sūryya
grahaṇadalu tarddavāḍisāsiradoḷagaṇa bāgeyayvattaṟa ba
ḷiya kriṣṇaveṇnā nadyuttarataṭada śrīmadagrahāraṁ gaṁḍegagrā
mada śrī kēsavadēvargge Āṁgabarasi tannāḷkeyalu śrīballavarasa
rgge binnapaṁgeydu sarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭa māṇikēsvarada matta
ru 60 ttaṟoḷage dēvara bra(ṁ)hmapurige 54 dēvara nivēdya caitrapa
vitrake Ā mattaru 6 Ā dēvara dēguladiṁ paḍuvalēḷēḷu kayya nivēśa
ṇa bhāṇasina maneyoḷagāgi 10 gāṇa 1 hūdōṭa 1 taḷabhōga
pārikhāya koḷagadāya baṇaṁbedeṟe yiṁtinituṁ sarvvabā
dhaparihāra dēvara bra(ṁ)hmapuriya sa(ṁ)ntānadalli makkaḷeni
barādaḍaṁ guṇajēṣṭanā vrittigoḍeya mattenibarādaḍaṁ vritti
bhāgaṁbōgadu Ā vrittiyanotteyiḍaluṁ māṟaluṁ santatihīna
nuṁ Ācārahīnanuṁ Ōlagisalu hōdaṁdavila yaṁtida
rkke Aṇnataṁmaṁdirādaḍaṁ yōgyaṁgaladila yidanatikramisi danaṁ praje
gaḷuṁ Arasugaḷuṁ bra(ṁ)hmapuri mahājanagaḷumirddu hoṟamaḍisi kaḷevaru
yī dharmmake sūryyaprabheyuṁ vāyuṁ vallade yārōrvvaruṁ hugalāgadu
© toḷaguva kuṁtaḷāṁganeya kuṁtaḷadēsamidembinaṁ manaṁgoḷi
suva tarddavāḍiyoḷagoppuva bāgeya kaṁpaṇakudagga ḷikeyano
ppukeydeseva gaṁḍeganūru viḷāsalīleyaṁ taḷevudadeṁntu baṇni
paḍaventu pogaḷuvaḍaventu nōrppaḍa . caṁḍakarāṁsugaḷu nija
karāṁsugaḷoḷu poḷedoppe tattaṭīdaṁḍakujaṁgaḷarvviniṁ ma
hānadītīramanoṁdu māḍi tatpāṁḍaradoḷu teṟaṁ boḷedu pāpapari
cyute kriṣṇaveṇne tāṁ paridu gāḍivetteseva gaṁḍeganūra mukha
pradēsadoḷu . Ā grāmacakravartiyoḷagriyanabhi
māni mānadhananenisirppaṁ vigrahakutūhaḷa sujanāgra
ṇi tatsōmanāthadaṁḍādīśa . Ātana kulavadhu guṇadoḷu
sītegaruṁdhatige ratige lakṣmige sahajabrātege pāsaṭivettaḷaThe letter ge is engraved above the line.
dē teṟadiṁ dēvalabbe lalanāratna . Avarirvvarigaṁ puṭṭida narō
ttava saṁpūrṇnarūpatējamanōjaṁ sivapādāṁbuja(ṁ) bhriṁ
gaṁ bhuvanastutanaytuvarmadaṁḍādhīśa . A manucaritana
kulavadhu sāmānyame piriya siriyoḷaṁ śīladoḷaṁ bhū
pōltaḷadaṟiṁdī mahiyoḷagarasikabbe vanitātiḷa
rirvvarigaṁ negaḷdantatakasutanamaḷacaritadiṁ pu
santōsade puṭṭi lakṣmīkāntege nele vayajanāthadaṁ
ntiyoḷiṁdu peṁpina mahōnnatiyoḷu ka
rvvadoḷu sāntanujaṁ calakke raghunaṁdana nanniyoḷakka
tadoḷindrajaṁ nuḍiva satyayudhiṣṭira saucadēḷge ha
ṇnisuvudurvvare vayjaṇadaṁḍanāthana . cāḷukyakṣi
besasalu bhūpāḷarkṣōbhise kāsavāḷasavalakkaṁ la
rvvidēśāḷeḷcāsira duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭaprati
ḷaṁdalu parirakṣegeydanadaṭiṁ śrīmalla
saraṇāgataraṁ satataṁ parirakṣaṇegeyva neredu bērppavara
vairiyaṁ saṁharisuva mūṟuṁ guṇakke nalla malla .
matta
suva
danavaru pālisu
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁThe following lines are engraved at
jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādhibhiḥ yasya
yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . Ōṁ namō nārāyaṇāya
Digital edition of SII 18.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
